metadata.description: AI-powered browser automation for Claude Code -- navigate, click, type, extract content, and automate workflows in real browsers. Supports MCP server and CLI daemon modes.

plugins.name: openbrowser
plugins.description: Browser automation MCP server with progressive disclosure design -- uses 3.2x fewer tokens than Playwright MCP across 6 tasks. Single execute_code tool runs Python with async browser functions. Includes CLI daemon for Bash-based workflows and compact description mode for token optimization.
